playlist.title: I Can't Wait
playlist.description: Signature synth bassline, super danceable, and still feels incredibly fresh.

playlist.title: Word Up!
playlist.description: An absolute funk-rock masterpiece with massive attitude that gets everyone moving.

playlist.title: Burning Down the House
playlist.description: Art-school funk that brings high energy without being a standard radio cliché.

playlist.title: Bizarre Love Triangle
playlist.description: Outstanding, emotional synth-pop dance floor filler.

playlist.title: Opportunities (Let's Make Lots of Money)
playlist.description: Uptempo and sarcastic synth-pop classic that serves as a fantastic party track.

playlist.title: Our House
playlist.description: Incredibly catchy, upbeat, and nostalgic ska-pop classic that always gets the crowd singing along.

playlist.title: Don't You Want Me?
playlist.description: A classic synth-pop anthem with a dramatic duet structure and a heavy, infectious beat.

playlist.title: Tainted Love
playlist.description: Minimalist yet highly energetic synth-pop masterpiece that everyone knows and sings along to.

playlist.title: Super Freak
playlist.description: The ultimate high-energy funk-disco banger with one of the most famous basslines in music history.

playlist.title: Celebration
playlist.description: The universal, timeless anthem for happy occasions and party dance floors.
Apocalyptic party funk that defined the early 80s dance sound.

playlist.title: Push It
playlist.description: A pioneering hip-hop/dance crossover with an irresistible, energetic rhythm.

playlist.title: Holiday
playlist.description: A bright, sunny, and incredibly catchy dance-pop anthem that started Madonna's rise.

playlist.title: Wild Thing
playlist.description: Classic late-80s hip-hop track featuring the recognizable Van Halen 'Jamie's Cryin' guitar hook.

playlist.title: Pump Up the Jam
playlist.description: A high-octane hip-house anthem that bridges the late 80s dance club transition.

playlist.title: Blue Monday
playlist.description: The best-selling 12-inch single of all time, presenting an iconic, driving electronic beat.

playlist.title: Walk Like an Egyptian
playlist.description: Fun, quirky pop-rock smash hit with an infectious tempo and great sing-along capability.

playlist.title: Girls Just Want to Have Fun
playlist.description: The quintessential energetic 80s girl-power party anthem.

playlist.title: Our Lips Are Sealed
playlist.description: Upbeat, catchy new wave pop-rock classic that captures the early 80s vibe perfectly.

playlist.title: The Safety Dance
playlist.description: Charming, high-energy synth-pop track that's guaranteed to get people dancing.

playlist.title: Let's Dance
playlist.description: Bowie's huge, Nile Rodgers-produced post-disco dance masterpiece.

playlist.title: My Prerogative
playlist.description: A powerful New Jack Swing anthem with a heavy beat and defiant, energetic vocals.

playlist.title: Footloose
playlist.description: The ultimate movie soundtrack dance anthem that gets everyone on their feet instantly.

playlist.title: Venus
playlist.description: A high-energy, fast-paced synth-pop cover that went straight to number one.

playlist.title: Wake Me Up Before You Go-Go
playlist.description: An incredibly energetic, upbeat pop anthem with a vibrant retro soul vibe.

playlist.title: Gloria
playlist.description: A driving, high-tempo pop-rock epic with soaring vocals and incredible drive.

playlist.title: We Got the Beat
playlist.description: Fast-paced, energetic punk-pop anthem that is a staple of early 80s party playlists.

playlist.title: Mickey
playlist.description: The ultimate cheerleading-style high-energy pop chant that is impossible to ignore.

playlist.title: Rumors
playlist.description: A seminal mid-80s R&B/freestyle dance track with a very catchy rhythm.

playlist.title: Express Yourself
playlist.description: A powerful, energetic dance-pop track with a strong message and a great brass-driven groove.

playlist.title: Hot Hot Hot
playlist.description: A raucous, horn-filled party song that is the quintessential festive conga-line starter.

playlist.title: Dancing in the Dark
playlist.description: Springsteen's biggest synth-rock hit with an upbeat tempo and a classic 80s drum beat.

playlist.title: 99 Red Balloons
playlist.description: The iconic, high-energy German-turned-global new wave hit that everyone knows.

playlist.title: Come On Eileen
playlist.description: Unstoppable celtic-pop-rock sing-along party classic with a legendary tempo increase.

playlist.title: You Spin Me Round (Like a Record)
playlist.description: Pure, high-octane Hi-NRG dance floor dynamite with a massive electronic drive.

playlist.title: Black Cars
playlist.description: Sleek, synth-heavy Canadian pop-rock track with a very cool mid-80s groove.

playlist.title: Doesn't Really Matter
playlist.description: A massive, uptempo Canadian new-wave/pop-rock hit with a very catchy synth hook and energetic beat.

playlist.title: The Sun Always Shines on T.V.
playlist.description: A dramatic, soaring synth-pop masterpiece with a massive, high-energy beat.

playlist.title: Beat It
playlist.description: The legendary high-energy dance-rock crossover with Eddie Van Halen's iconic guitar solo.

playlist.title: We Don't Have to Take Our Clothes Off
playlist.description: An incredibly infectious, upbeat dance-pop anthem that is a quintessential 80s party tune.

playlist.title: Let's Talk About Sex
playlist.description: Playful, catchy hip-hop track with a massive groove that gets the room talking and moving.

playlist.title: Faith
playlist.description: An iconic, bopping pop-rock classic with that unmistakable organ intro and acoustic guitar groove.

playlist.title: The Reflex
playlist.description: A huge, high-energy new-wave synth-pop chart-topper with an incredibly catchy rhythm and vocal hooks.

playlist.title: Careless Whisper
playlist.description: One of the most famous saxophone intros in history and a defining 80s slow-dance classic.

playlist.title: Time After Time
playlist.description: A beautifully emotional pop masterpiece that is one of the greatest love songs ever written.
